---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for find-script
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of what problem you are trying to solve.

For example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Use case

Describe the concrete scenario in which this feature would be useful:

- What type of script are you looking for?
- What is your workflow today?
- How would this feature improve it?

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I would be willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can write tests
- [ ] I can write documentation
- [ ] I just want to track this idea

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.
